title: Saudi Arabian Chicken and Rice Bowl
description: A classic Saudi dish made with flavorful chicken, saffron-infused rice, and aromatic spices.

ingredients.name: aromatic spices
ingredients.notes: ground cumin, coriander, turmeric, and cinnamon

instructions: Heat oil in a large saucepan over medium-high heat.
Add chicken and cook until browned, about 5-7 minutes.
Remove chicken from saucepan and set aside.
Add onion and garlic to saucepan and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add aromatic spices, saffron, and chicken broth to saucepan and stir to combine.
Add rice to saucepan and stir to coat with spice mixture.
Bring saucepan to a boil, then reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 18-20 minutes.
Fluff rice with a fork and stir in cooked chicken.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley, if desired.
